Notes: Single UPDATE contains an add_rr and a delete_rrset for the same owner/type. The prerequisite ensures the RRset exists before the message is processed. The follow-up QUERY checks whether the RRset survives, is removed, or the server rejected the UPDATE.

Steps.Description: Add a new A RR to a.campus.edu. and delete the entire A RRset at the same owner/type in the same Update Section.

Steps.Name: a.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RRset is absent, unchanged, or reflects the added record after the UPDATE.
